title: eleocharis plantaginea
intro: Eleocharis plantaginea, also known as spike-rush, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestive issues and relieve symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery. The health benefits of Eleocharis plantaginea include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the digestive system. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, often in combination with other medicinal plants, to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various gastrointestinal disorders.
